title: Fusion LCOE vs. Renewables + Storage (2025-2050)
required_metrics: Fusion LCOE ($/MWh) - central estimate and range
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
data_quality_rule: Use published LCOE values from Lazard and IRENA for renewables; for fusion, use ranges from FIA or developer estimates. If only two endpoints exist, interpolate using CAGR from public forecasts and mark as estimates.

title: Fusion Funding Timeline (2010-2024) by Source
executive_question: How has investment evolved and who is investing?
comparison_set: Private vs. government funding over time
data_quality_rule: Use FIA annual funding surveys for private investment; DOE budget documents for government. Ensure at least 4 annual data points; if gaps exist, use linear interpolation with source note.

title: Fusion Startup Survival Curve
executive_question: What fraction of startups will reach commercialization?
comparison_set: Bubble size = funding, x-axis = year founded, y-axis = stage (ordinal), color = status
data_quality_rule: Include only companies with verifiable funding data. Stage must be based on public milestones. Exclude companies with no public information.

title: Key Fusion Projects and Their Milestones
executive_question: What is the realistic timeline for first power?
required_metrics: Milestone (e.g., first plasma, net energy, grid connection)
data_quality_rule: Use only official project announcements or independent reviews. Mark delays with source. If a milestone is not publicly dated, exclude.

title: Tritium Supply-Demand Gap Forecast
executive_question: Will tritium availability limit fusion deployment?
required_metrics: Tritium supply (kg/year) from CANDU reactors and other sources
data_quality_rule: Use IAEA data for supply; demand based on fusion plant scenarios (e.g., 1 GW plant consumes ~56 kg/year). If only two points, use linear interpolation with source note.

title: Fusion vs. Fission vs. Solar vs. Wind Investment (2020-2030)
executive_question: How does fusion investment compare to other clean energy technologies?
required_metrics: Annual investment in nuclear fission ($ billion)
comparison_set: Fusion vs. fission vs. solar vs. wind
data_quality_rule: Use IEA and BNEF data for historical and projected values. For fusion, use FIA data. If projections are not available, use CAGR from recent trends and mark as estimates.

title: Fusion LCOE Sensitivity to Key Variables
executive_question: Which variables most affect fusion cost competitiveness?
required_metrics: Variable (capital cost, capacity factor, discount rate, fuel cost)
data_quality_rule: Use published sensitivity ranges from credible sources. If only base case available, assume ±30% for capital cost and ±10% for capacity factor. Mark assumptions.
